name: ExtensionDeviceDefinition_HasPart
title: R5: A device, part of the current one (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DeviceDefinition.hasPart` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DeviceDefinition.hasPart` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DeviceDefinition.hasPart` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DeviceDefinition.hasPart` has a context of DeviceDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `DeviceDefinition`.
Element `DeviceDefinition.hasPart` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
